description: Recto: Letter in Arabic script. Mentioning a letter of a qāḍī Abū Muḥammad al-Nāʾib. Asks for news of Abū l-Surūr and if he has traveled to the west (al-Gharb) or not. Greetings to al-Muʿallā (=ha-Meʿulle?), Abū Isḥāq, and Abū l-ʿAlāʾ. Verso: Accounts in Judaeo-Arabic. Needs further examination.
description_he: מכתב בArabic, Judaeo-Arabic. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
